Package com.example.getoutthere.organizer

package com.example.getoutthere.organizer
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.example.getoutthere
     
  • Class
    Description
    CancelledFragment
    Fragment displaying the list of entrants who have cancelled or declined an event invitation.
    EnrolledFragment
    Fragment displaying the list of entrants who have enrolled for an event.
    EntrantAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for displaying entrants in organizer fragments.
    EntrantAdapter.EntrantViewHolder
    ViewHolder for entrant items.
    EntrantAdapter.OnCancelClickListener
    Listener interface for cancel button click events on entrant rows.
    EntrantListActivity
    Displays the list of entrants currently on the event's waiting list.
    EntrantListActivityTest
    Instrumented test for EntrantListActivity.
    EventMapActivity
    An Activity that displays a map showing the locations of entrants on a waiting list for a specific event.
    EventQrCodeActivity
    Displays the QR code for an event.
    InvitedFragment
    Fragment displaying invited entrants for an event.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity
    Allows organizers to create a new event.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener
    Listener interface used to return the Timestamp chosen in the date and time picker.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivityTest
    Instrumented test to verify the logic and input validation of the Organizer Create Event screen.
    OrganizerEditEventActivity
    Allows organizers to edit an existing event.
    OrganizerEditEventActivity.TimestampSelectionListener
    Listener interface used to return the Timestamp chosen in the date and time picker.
    OrganizerEditEventActivityTest
    Instrumented tests for OrganizerEditEventActivity.
    OrganizerEventAdapter
    Represents the adapter that maps Event objects to their corresponding UI components for organizers.
    OrganizerEventDetailsActivity
    Activity for organizer to view details of a specific event.
    OrganizerEventDetailsActivityTest
    Instrumented tests for OrganizerEventDetailsActivity.
    OrganizerEventListActivity
    Displays a list of Events created by the current user.
    OrganizerEventListActivityTest
    Tests the functionality of OrganizerEventListActivity.
    OrganizerTabAdapter
    Adapter providing fragments for the organizer's tabbed event view.
    OrganizerWaitlistActivity
    Activity for organizer to manage event entrants.
    WaitlistFragment
    Fragment displaying the waitlist for an event.
    WaitlistFragmentTest
    Instrumented tests for WaitlistFragment.
